---
title: "Team"
toc: false
page-layout: full

listing:
  - id: team
    contents:
      - image: images/jan.jpeg
        path: https://janpfander.github.io/
        title: "[Jan Pfänder](https://janpfander.github.io/)"
        subtitle: Postdoc, [Climate and Societal Change Group](https://www.eawag.ch/en/abteilung/ess/schwerpunkte/climate-and-societal-change-casc/) at Eawag, *Switzerland*
        sortby: "1"

      - image: images/yara.jpg
        path: https://yarakyrychenko.github.io/
        title: "[Yara Kyrychenko](https://yarakyrychenko.github.io/)"
        subtitle: PhD Candidate, [Cambridge Social Decision-Making Lab](https://www.sdmlab.psychol.cam.ac.uk/), University of Cambridge, *United Kingdom*
        sortby: "2"

      - image: images/dirk.png
        path: https://www.mpib-berlin.mpg.de/staff/dirk-wulff
        title: "[Dirk U. Wulff](https://www.mpib-berlin.mpg.de/staff/dirk-wulff)"
        subtitle: Senior Research Scientist, [Center for Adaptive Rationality](https://www.mpib-berlin.mpg.de/research/research-centers/adaptive-rationality), Max Planck Institute for Human Development, *Germany*
        sortby: "3"

      - image: images/jon.jpg
        path: https://www.sdmlab.psychol.cam.ac.uk/staff/professor-jon-roozenbeek
        title: "[Jon Roozenbeek](https://www.sdmlab.psychol.cam.ac.uk/staff/professor-jon-roozenbeek)"
        subtitle: Associate Professor, University of Cambridge & VU Amsterdam, *United Kingdom / Netherlands*
        sortby: "5"

      - image: images/viktoria.jpg
        path: https://www.viktoriacologna.com/
        title: "[Viktoria Cologna](https://www.viktoriacologna.com/)"
        subtitle: Group leader, [Climate and Societal Change Group](https://www.eawag.ch/en/abteilung/ess/schwerpunkte/climate-and-societal-change-casc/) at Eawag, *Switzerland*
        sortby: "6"

      - image: images/miriam.jpg
        path: https://www.sdmlab.psychol.cam.ac.uk/staff/miriam-remshard
        title: "[Miriam Remshard](https://www.sdmlab.psychol.cam.ac.uk/staff/miriam-remshard)"
        subtitle: PhD Candidate, [Cambridge Social Decision-Making Lab](https://www.sdmlab.psychol.cam.ac.uk/), University of Cambridge, *United Kingdom*
        sortby: "7"

      - image: images/sara.png
        path: https://sustainability.stanford.edu/people/sara-constantino
        title: "[Sara Constantino](https://sustainability.stanford.edu/people/sara-constantino)"
        subtitle: Assistant Professor, Stanford University, *United States*
        sortby: "4"

    type: grid
    image-height: 325px
    grid-columns: 3
    fields: [image, title, subtitle]
    grid-item-align: center
    grid-item-border: false
    sort: sortby

link-external-newwindow: true
---

:::{#team}
:::
